title: Day 14 Reflection
description: Review Week 2 machine coding performance and prepare for Week 3.

prompts.question: What did you complete in 120 minutes? What did you cut and why?
prompts.guidance: Be honest about time pressure decisions — interviewers value prioritization.

prompts.question: Which Week 2 topic slowed you down most: debounce, filters, infinite scroll, Context, or routing?
prompts.guidance: Name specific moments where you got stuck.

prompts.question: Explain your cart architecture out loud: Context, reducer, actions, and immutability.
prompts.guidance: Pretend an interviewer asked 'walk me through your state management'.

prompts.question: What would you do differently with an extra 30 minutes?
prompts.guidance: Prioritize by interview impact — tests, types, UX polish.

prompts.question: List three Week 2 concepts you can now explain confidently and three to revisit before Week 3.
